title: cyrtomium umbonatum
intro: Cyrtomium umbonatum, also known as umbrella fern, is a type of plant belonging to the Cyrtomium genus, characterized by its distinctive umbrella-shaped fronds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyrtomium umbonatum include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and alleviating pain. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits.
